meta.description: Oversee chat and messaging on the platform.

meta.title: Training — Admin
meta.description: Manage training programs and onboarding content.

page.title: Admin Workspace
page.subtitle: Start with the live queues and operational modules that are usable today.
page.honestyNote: This workspace separates active admin work from areas that are still limited or placeholder-only.

live.heading: Operational now
live.note: These are the admin areas you can rely on for real work today.

limited.heading: Visible but still limited
limited.note: These routes exist, but they are not complete operational surfaces yet.

placeholder.heading: Not ready yet
placeholder.note: Keep these secondary for now. They are still placeholder-only.

limited.label: Limited
limited.note: Part of the surface exists, but it is not fully operational yet.

placeholder.label: Placeholder
placeholder.note: This route is still a placeholder and should not be treated as a live module.

support.heading: Support queue
support.note: Open tickets that need direct operational follow-up.
support.emptyHeading: No open support work right now
support.empty: No open support tickets right now.
support.errorHeading: Support queue is not available right now

applications.heading: Pending applications
applications.note: Submitted practitioner applications waiting for review.
applications.emptyHeading: No pending application work right now
applications.errorHeading: Applications queue is not available right now

support.title: Support
support.description: Manage tickets, reply to users, add internal notes, and update status.

applications.title: Practitioner Applications
applications.description: Review and decide on incoming practitioner applications.

specialties.title: Specialties
specialties.description: Manage the active specialties catalog with create, edit, and deactivate actions inside the current contract.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Look up a payment by ID, inspect refund state, and handle limited refund operations.

settlements.title: Settlements
settlements.description: Review settlement batches, inspect payout status, and complete admin-only settlement closeout actions within the current contract.

careChat.title: Care Chat
careChat.description: Review approval requests, decide whether care chat can open, and inspect approved conversations in a bounded admin flow.

moderationReports.title: Moderation reports
moderationReports.description: Inspect moderation reports, review current case status, and execute limited actions that the backend currently supports.

articles.title: Articles
articles.description: Manage article visibility, status, and limited publish/archive actions within the current contract.

meta.listDescription: Look up a payment by ID and inspect the current operational payment snapshot.
meta.detailDescription: Inspect payment status, session context, refund activity, and recent provider events.

lookup.title: Inspect a payment by ID
lookup.note: This surface is intentionally visibility-first. It helps admin operations inspect a payment, understand refund state, and handle the limited refund actions the backend supports right now.
lookup.helper: Use a real payment ID from support, payment callbacks, or internal operational context.
lookup.deepLinkNote: If you already have a payment ID, you can open the detail surface directly from /admin/payments/{paymentId}.

items.lookup: Look up one payment at a time by payment ID.
items.snapshot: Inspect the payment summary, provider references, and linked session context.
items.refunds: Review refund history and request or retry a refund only where the backend allows it.
items.events: See the latest provider-facing payment events that were recorded.

items.noList: There is no global admin payments list in the current backend contract.
items.noSettlements: Settlement operations are not part of this baseline.
items.noPayouts: Payout workflows are not exposed here.
items.noFinanceSuite: This is not a full finance suite or accounting workspace.

detail.title: Payment detail
detail.note: Use this screen to inspect the current payment state, linked session context, refund activity, and recent provider events. It stays within the current backend-supported finance baseline.
detail.snapshotNote: Use this operational summary to quickly tell whether this payment is visibility-only right now or whether a limited refund action may still be relevant.
detail.visibilityNote: This surface is operational visibility first. Editable finance controls stay limited to the refund actions the backend currently supports.
detail.sessionNote: Session context is shown only when the payment is linked to a session.
detail.refundSummaryNote: This summary reflects refund records already known to the backend for this payment.
detail.refundsNote: Refund actions are shown only where the current refund record is truly retryable.

notes.CREATED: The payment record exists, but it has not become a completed payment yet.
notes.PENDING: The payment is still pending and may need more time or a later state change.
notes.REQUIRES_ACTION: The provider still expects a user-side action before the payment can complete.
notes.AUTHORIZED: Funds were authorized, but this does not automatically mean refund work is available.
notes.CAPTURED: The payment was captured successfully and is fully visible in the admin snapshot.
notes.FAILED: The payment did not complete successfully, so this screen is mostly visibility-only.
notes.CANCELLED: The payment was cancelled before completing, so this screen is mostly visibility-only.
notes.EXPIRED: The payment expired before completing, so this screen is mostly visibility-only.
notes.REFUND_PENDING: A refund-related state is already active for this payment.
notes.PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: At least one refund already succeeded, but the payment still has remaining history to inspect.
notes.REFUNDED: This payment has already been fully refunded.

refunded.title: Fully refunded
refunded.note: Refund history is complete for this payment. Use the timeline below for visibility only.

inFlight.title: Refund already in progress
inFlight.note: A requested or processing refund already exists. Monitor the existing refund activity before trying anything else.

retryAvailable.title: Retryable refund history
retryAvailable.note: A failed refund record exists. Use the refund activity section below if the current record is truly retryable.

historyPresent.title: Refund history present
historyPresent.note: This payment already has refund records on file. Review the timeline before deciding whether another action is appropriate.

noRefunds.title: No refund activity yet
noRefunds.note: There are no refund records for this payment right now.

fullyRefunded.title: Visibility only
fullyRefunded.note: A new refund request is not shown because this payment is already fully refunded.

refundInFlight.title: Wait for current refund
refundInFlight.note: A new refund request is hidden while an existing refund is already in progress.

requestAvailable.title: Limited refund controls
requestAvailable.note: The refund request form is available here, but server-side validation still decides whether the action is allowed.

sessionRuntime.heading: Runtime inspection
sessionRuntime.note: Open the runtime inspection tool to check join readiness and provider linkage.

refundForm.heading: Request a refund
refundForm.note: Use this only when the backend contract allows a refund for the current payment. Validation still happens server-side.
refundForm.amountPlaceholder: Leave empty to let the backend decide the default refund amount
refundForm.reasonPlaceholder: Add a short operational reason for the refund request

fullyRefunded.heading: Refund request is not shown
fullyRefunded.note: This payment is already fully refunded, so the current admin baseline stays visibility-only here.

refundInFlight.heading: Refund request is temporarily hidden
refundInFlight.note: A refund is already requested or processing for this payment. Review the current refund activity below instead of sending another request now.

detailError.heading: Payment detail is not available right now
detailError.note: Could not load this payment snapshot. Try again or return to the lookup screen.

notFound.heading: Payment was not found
notFound.note: We could not find a payment with this ID in the current admin payment contract.

noSession.heading: No linked session
noSession.note: This payment is not currently linked to a session context in the admin snapshot.

noRefunds.heading: No refund activity yet
noRefunds.note: There are no refund records for this payment right now.

noEvents.heading: No recent events
noEvents.note: No recent payment events are available for this payment right now.

errors.notRefundable: This payment is not refundable in its current state.
errors.refundInProgress: A refund is already in progress for this payment.
errors.alreadyRefunded: This payment has already been fully refunded.
errors.refundAmountExceedsRemaining: The refund amount is higher than the remaining refundable amount.
errors.refundNotRetryable: This refund cannot be retried right now.
errors.refundNotFound: The refund record was not found.
errors.generic: Could not complete this refund action right now.

meta.listDescription: Manage assessment drafts, questions, options, and publishing lifecycle.
meta.detailDescription: Edit one assessment definition with lifecycle-safe admin controls.

list.title: Assessments
list.note: Create drafts, review lifecycle state, and open the editor for structured authoring.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, slug, or category

error.heading: Assessment editor is unavailable
error.note: Could not load this assessment right now.

empty.heading: No assessments yet
empty.note: Create the first assessment draft to start the authoring flow.
empty.filtered: No assessments match the current filters.

feedback.validation: Please complete the required fields before saving.
feedback.publishMissingOptions: Cannot publish yet. Add options for these questions first: {questions}

editor.readOnlyNotice: This version is not a draft. Use Fork draft to create an editable next version.

questions.autoKeyHint: Question key will be generated automatically on save.

options.heading: Options
options.label: Option label
options.autoKeyHint: Option key will be generated automatically on save.

preview.note: This section is only for testing the scoring before publish. It does not create real patient submissions.
preview.empty: Add at least one question with options to preview the score.
preview.missingOptions: {count, number} question(s) are skipped in preview because they do not have valid option keys yet.
preview.missingOptionsListLabel: Questions that still need valid options:

workflow.setupHint: Start with the core setup only. Advanced text fields are optional.
workflow.questionsHint: Add each question, then add answer options with their score values.
workflow.scoringHint: Set score ranges for each band so the final result maps correctly.
workflow.previewHint: Try a sample answer path before publishing.

publishChecklist.title: Publish readiness
publishChecklist.questions: At least one question was added

deleteQuestionModal.title: Delete question
deleteQuestionModal.note: This will delete the question and all of its options.

deleteOptionModal.title: Delete option
deleteOptionModal.note: This option will be removed from this question.

createModal.title: Create assessment draft
createModal.note: Create a new draft and continue editing in the full editor.

errors.notDraft: Only draft assessments can be edited.
errors.forkRequiresPublishedActive: Only active published assessments can be forked.
errors.publishRequiresDraft: Only draft assessments can be published.
errors.unpublishRequiresActive: Only active published assessments can be unpublished.
errors.immutablePublished: This published version is immutable. Use fork draft.
errors.draftForkExists: A draft fork for this version already exists.
errors.invalidQuestionOrder: Question order is out of range.
errors.invalidOptionOrder: Option order is out of range.
errors.publishMetadataIncomplete: Publish failed because metadata is incomplete.
errors.publishNoQuestions: Publish failed because no questions exist.
errors.publishDuplicateQuestionKey: Publish failed because question keys are duplicated.
errors.publishDuplicateOptionKey: Publish failed because option keys are duplicated.
errors.publishDuplicateQuestionOrder: Publish failed because question order is duplicated.
errors.publishDuplicateOptionOrder: Publish failed because option order is duplicated.
errors.publishEmptyOptions: Publish failed because a question has no options.
errors.scoringInvalidRange: One scoring threshold range is invalid.
errors.generic: Could not complete this action right now.

meta.title: Specialties Catalog - Admin
meta.description: Manage the active specialties catalog with the limited admin controls the current backend supports.

specialtiesAdmin.title: Manage active specialties
specialtiesAdmin.note: This baseline lets admin create, edit, and deactivate practitioner specialties. It stays within the current contract and does not pretend to be a broader taxonomy suite.

scopeItems.activeList: Review the currently active specialties catalog.
scopeItems.create: Create a new specialty with canonical slug, localized title, description, and sort order.
scopeItems.deactivate: Deactivate an active specialty when it should stop appearing in public reads and new practitioner linkage.

boundaryItems.noInactiveList: There is no admin endpoint to list inactive specialties right now.
boundaryItems.noReactivate: Reactivating an inactive specialty is blocked by the current read surface because inactive records are not exposed back to admin.
boundaryItems.noCategories: Only category creation is available from this screen in the current contract. Full category management is still out of scope.

list.heading: Active catalog
list.note: This list reflects the public and shared active catalog because that is the current read contract available to admin too.

form.createNote: New specialties created here become part of the active catalog baseline.
form.editNote: Edits apply to the active specialty you selected from the current catalog list.
form.titlePlaceholder: Localized title for the current language
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional short description for the current language

deactivateConfirm.heading: Deactivate this specialty?
deactivateConfirm.note: Deactivating hides it from public catalog reads and blocks new practitioner linkage, but existing practitioner links are not deleted automatically.

feedback.validation: Primary category and specialty name are required.
feedback.slugPattern: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only for the slug.
feedback.sortOrder: Sort order must be a whole number that is zero or higher.
feedback.createError: Could not create this specialty right now.
feedback.createCategoryError: Could not create the primary category right now.
feedback.updateError: Could not update this specialty right now.
feedback.updateCategoryError: Could not update this primary specialty right now.
feedback.activateError: Could not activate this specialty right now.
feedback.activateCategoryError: Could not activate this primary specialty right now.
feedback.deactivateSuccess: {title} was deactivated. Inactive specialties are outside the current admin read baseline.
feedback.deactivateError: Could not deactivate this specialty right now.
feedback.deactivateCategoryError: Could not deactivate this primary specialty right now.

empty.heading: No active specialties found
empty.note: Create a specialty to start the active catalog baseline.
empty.filtered: No active specialties matched this search.

error.heading: Specialties catalog is not available right now
error.note: Could not load the current active specialties catalog.

boundaryCard.heading: Important boundary
boundaryCard.note: Because the current admin read surface only exposes active specialties, this baseline can create, edit, and deactivate active records but cannot reopen inactive ones yet.

structure.emptySecondaryInCategory: No sub-specialties under this primary specialty yet.

categoryForm.createNote: Create a primary specialty first, then add sub-specialties under it.
categoryForm.editNote: Update the primary specialty name and short description.
categoryForm.title: Primary specialty name

page.subtitle: Active queues and quick access to all operational modules.

pendingApplications.empty: No pending applications at this time.

page.title: Practitioner Applications
page.subtitle: Review incoming applications and manage the practitioner review queue.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by applicant name or specialty

applications.empty: No applications match the selected filter.

applications.title: Practitioner applications

directCreate.heading: Direct practitioner onboarding
directCreate.note: Create a practitioner account directly from admin without waiting for self-submitted application.
directCreate.modalDescription: This creates a practitioner account and marks the baseline application as approved.
directCreate.validationCategoryRequired: Select a primary specialty category first.
directCreate.validationSpecialtiesRequired: Select at least one specialty from the selected category.
directCreate.validationYears: Years of experience must be zero or greater.
directCreate.specialtiesEmptyForCategory: No active specialties are available under this category yet.
directCreate.submitError: Could not create practitioner right now.

avatar.title: Update practitioner photo
avatar.note: This updates only the practitioner profile photo URL.
avatar.hint: Paste a direct image URL. Remove keeps the account and clears only the photo.

validation.required: Enter a photo URL before saving.

feedback.updateError: Could not update practitioner photo right now.
feedback.removeError: Could not remove practitioner photo right now.

meta.title: Application Review — Admin
meta.description: Review applicant profile, credentials, and readiness. Approve or reject the application.

credentials.deleteConfirm: Delete this credential from the application?
credentials.addError: Could not add credential. Verify required fields.

save.error: Could not save edits. Check required fields first.

decision.heading: Take a decision
decision.notReviewable: This application cannot be reviewed in its current state.

approve.title: Approve
approve.notePlaceholder: Add an optional note for the practitioner
approve.error: Could not approve application. Please try again.

requestChanges.title: Request changes
requestChanges.reasonPlaceholder: Required — what should the practitioner update?
requestChanges.reasonRequired: A reason is required to request changes.
requestChanges.error: Could not request changes. Please try again.

reject.title: Reject
reject.reasonPlaceholder: Required — provide a clear reason for rejection
reject.reasonRequired: A reason is required to reject the application.
reject.notePlaceholder: Add further context or guidance for the practitioner
reject.error: Could not reject application. Please try again.

feedback.loadError: Could not load application details. Please try again.
